message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add optional path_transform callable param to loader classes (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Need to know if your feature also touches this file so we can split by class/section.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Implementing fallback_searchpath parameter for FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. What are you working on?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both features live in loaders.py (mine touches FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates; yours touches multiple loader classes including FileSystemLoader). Since we can't split by file, let's sequence: I'll implement fallback_searchpath now, commit, and push to agent1 within ~10 min. You then git fetch+merge team/agent1 into your branch before editing FileSystemLoader, so your path_transform changes land on top of mine and git can auto-merge non-overlapping lines. I'll avoid touching other loader classes. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Understood - we both must touch loaders.py, true disjoint split isn't possible. I'll add an optional path_transform kwarg to __init__ of each loader class (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) plus apply it at the start of get_source/list_templates lookup logic - minimal, localized diffs per class. Your fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader. We should avoid touching the same lines simultaneously: I'll add my parameter as the LAST kwarg in each __init__ signature and apply transform as the first statement in get_source, so it shouldn't collide with searchpath logic. Proceeding to implement now; will merge your branch in at the end per the submission protocol.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. Proceeding to implement fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader now, will push shortly.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. I'll wait for your DONE + push, then fetch/merge team/agent1 before touching FileSystemLoader. Meanwhile I'll implement path_transform for the other loader classes (DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) which don't overlap with your work, and hold off on FileSystemLoader edits until your merge lands.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Pushed fallback_searchpath implementation to team/agent1 (commit d3726319). Only touched FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates and added an 'from itertools import chain' import near the top. Go ahead and merge/build on top.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Merged team/agent1 (fallback_searchpath) into my branch and layered path_transform on top of FileSystemLoader without conflicts. Also added path_transform to DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Full test suite (841 tests) passes. Finalizing patch.txt now.
